reason: The Net – tense techno-thriller with non-violent suspense
Twelve Monkeys – time-twisting mystery, cerebral and gripping
Copycat – psychological serial-killer study, low on gore
Heat – methodical heist thriller with simmering tension
Mission: Impossible – strategic espionage, high stakes, low blood
Broken Arrow – nuclear thriller, suspense over spectacle
Con Air – intense airborne manhunt without graphic violence
Air Force One – ticking-clock hijack drama, restrained gore
Hunt for Red October – cat-and-mouse submarine thriller
Under Siege – shipboard siege, relentless tension
